title: bulbostylis psammophila
intro: Bulbostylis psammophila, also known as sand couch-grass or sand spike-rush, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae and is native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bulbostylis psammophila include its ability to reduce fever, relieve headaches, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
